title: JCEF
html:
JCEF

The second of the two Oregon scholarship organizations (alongside the Ford Family Foundation) that funded Yahir through OSU and the Shanghai study abroad. JCEF is consistently bracketed with Ford in his notes — the two operate as a complementary funding pair, with JCEF more reactive (grades-driven disbursements, refunds, claim cycles) than Ford. Contact: Quin (per 2024 05 13 things).

The earliest mention is in 2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo — November 2020, senior-year application sprint — where JCEF appears alongside Renaissance, OSU, and Ford as the four scholarship apps in flight. The hit-rate ended up high; Ford gave the full ride and JCEF became the supplementary disbursement engine.

The administrative cadence shows up in repeated working-memory entries:

  • 2021 09 15 m1 mac buy list — "laptop shipped to JCEF for refund" (the M1 MacBook went through a JCEF reimbursement loop, which suggests the funding model includes after-the-fact gear refunds, not just direct payouts).
  • 2022 01 30 going forward — Jan 2022 — JCEF in the FAFSA / scholarship-renewal admin layer.
  • 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip / 2024 05 13 things — May 2024 — "submit grades to get money from jcef", "talk to JCEF about china plan", and the explicit Quin contact for coordinating the Shanghai release.
  • 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook — "hoping to juice $3000 from JCEF minus PCC classes" — Yahir is using JCEF as a Q4-2024 bridge through the financial pickle of winter break ($1914 owed to Jeff, $550 rent, $150 in account, "Trump card is the insurance money"). JCEF as last-resort liquidity event.

What JCEF matters for in the graph: it's the operational scholarship — the one Yahir spends actual labor maintaining (grades submission, gear refund routing, claim coordination), versus Ford which is more set-and-forget. The pair together is the funded-trajectory infrastructure that made the OSU degree, the India/Nepal/Shanghai travel arc, and the late-2024 winter-break survival possible. The "be a project youth plus donor" aspiration in 2025 05 30 todos is the conceptual repayment — pay the JCEF/Ford pattern forward to the next generation of poor and small-town kids.

  • 2021 09 15 m1 mac buy list
  • 2022 01 30 going forward
